text:
There are different kinds of electronic devices in the Hunter × Hunter world.

Telephones

Telephones range from classic wired telephones to touchscreen smartphones. They are used as a regular means of communication and for other functions.

 
Milluki phone HXH 99 EP50.png|Milluki's cell phone
Killua's phone HXH 99 EP49.png|Killua's cell phone
HxH CHP71 Neon phone.png|Neon's phone
Kurapikas phone HXH 99 EP63.png|Kurapika's cell phone
Nostrades phone hxh 1999.png|Light's cell phone
Shalnark's_nen_2.png|Shalnark using Black Voice through his cell phone
Zoldyck Gate Classic Wired Phone HXH 99 EP33.png|A classic wired telephone at the Zoldyck Testing Gate
53 - Zoldyck transmitter 2011.png|Zoldyck Personal Transmitter
Beatle 07 2011 Anime.png|Beatle-07 owned by Gon, Killua, and Leorio
Gotoh_-_140.png|Gotoh using a classic table phone
Leorio smartphone EP140 IMG.png|Leorio uses a touchscreen smartphone
HxH2011 EP140 Kurapika's Phone.png|Kurapika with a touchscreen smartphone
HxH2011_EP141_Killua_Phone_IMG.png|Killua with a touchscreen smartphone
Tserriednich uses his smartphone.png|Tserriednich with a line of smartphone at his disposal
406 - Love Dial 6700.png|Chrollo using his Love Dial 6700 to search for an "ideal partner"
 

Tablets

A tablet is a mobile PC, typically with a mobile operating system and LCD touchscreen display processing circuitry, and a rechargeable battery in a single thin, flat package.

Along with smartphones, tablets are used by several characters throughout the series.

 
Killua watching Leorio's footage.png|Killua using a tablet in Episode 141 (2011)/Chapter 326
 

Computers

Computers have significant variations, ranging from old models with cumbersome designs to modern models with flat screens and compact CPUs. Laptops are also available everywhere in the world.

 
HxH2011 EP3 Nicholas on his laptop.png|Nicholas with a laptop
Old computer HXH 99 EP49.png|Killua uses an old model computer
HxH2011 EP38 Laptop.png|Gon using a laptop at his home on Whale Island
Milluki_-_138.png|Milluki uses the latest computer model at the time in which he wished to Alluka to get
Milluki_checking_computer.png|Vast flat-screen computers in Milluki's room
Hunter-x-Hunter-2011-Episode-60-36.png|A computer screen is connected with the JoyStation Console
HxH2011 EP41 Gon and Killua using a laptop.png|Gon and Killua use a laptop in the internet cafe
 

Faxes

Although never seen, a fax machine is mentioned. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 80 

Radios

Small compact radios are used in Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 12, Chapter 112 

 
Small radio HXH 1999.png|Leorio using a radio
 

Printers

Printers can be seen in Yorknew City.

 
Printer HXH 1999.png|Shalnark printing Nostrade's family members location
 

Tape Deck

A tape deck, or tape recorder, is a device used alongside magnetic tapes to record, reproduce, or playback audio. Gon's is the most noteworthy in the universe, and he uses it to listen to his father's message. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 66 

 
HxH2011 EP38 Tape Deck.png|A tape deck in Episode 38 (2011)/Chapter 66
 

Trivia

In Chapter 348, on the back of Tserriednich's smartphone, it is possible to see a stylized apple with a malevolent expression. This is a reference to the real-life company, Apple Inc., founded by Steve Jobs.
